languages.text: "А сержант-инструктор Йоваха возглавляет отряд, обороняющийся у проложенной нами тропы к ксеноруинам на северо-западе от посадочной площадки. По ней пришли первые раненные, а их преследовали эти клятые твари".

"And Drill Sergeant Jovakha is leading a squad defending the path we've established to the xenoruins north-west of the landing pad. That's where the first wounded came in, and they were being chased by those cursed creatures."
languages.original_text: "А сержант-инструктор Йоваха возглавляет отряд, обороняющийся у проложенной нами тропы к ксеноруинам на северо-западе от посадочной площадки. По ней пришли первые раненные, а их преследовали эти клятые твари".

languages.text: 「そして、ジョヴァカ軍曹が、着陸地点の北西にある異星遺跡への道を守る部隊を率いています。最初の負傷者が入ってきたのは、そこです。そして、彼らはワープ生物に追われていました」
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha is leading a squad defending the path we've established to the xenoruins north-west of the landing pad. That's where the first wounded came in, and they were being chased by those warp creatures."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、ジョヴァカ軍曹が、着陸地点の北西にある異星遺跡への道を守る部隊を率いています。最初の負傷者が入ってきたのは、そこです。そして、彼らはワープ生物に追われていました。」

languages.text: «El sargento de instrucción Jovakha lidera una unidad que protege el camino establecido hasta las xenorruinas al noroeste de la plataforma de aterrizaje. Es donde llegaron los primeros heridos, perseguidos por esas malditas criaturas».
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha is leading a squad defending the path we've established to the xenoruins north-west of the landing pad. That's where the first wounded came in, and they were being chased by those cursed creatures."

traits.locale_text: «El sargento de instrucción Jovakha lidera una unidad que protege el camino establecido hasta las xenorruinas al noroeste de la plataforma de aterrizaje. Es donde llegaron los primeros heridos, perseguidos por esas malditas criaturas».

languages.text: "Und Drill Sergeant Jovakha verteidigt mit einem Trupp den Weg zu den Xenoruinen nordwestlich der Landeplattform. Dort kamen die ersten Verwundeten an ... verfolgt von diesen verfluchten Kreaturen."
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha is leading a squad defending the path we've established to the xenoruins north-west of the landing pad. That's where the first wounded came in, and they were being chased by those cursed creatures."

traits.locale_text: "Und Drill Sergeant Jovakha verteidigt mit einem Trupp den Weg zu den Xenoruinen nordwestlich der Landeplattform. Dort kamen die ersten Verwundeten an ... verfolgt von diesen verfluchten Kreaturen."

languages.text: « Le sergent-instructeur Jovakha, accompagné de son escouade, est parti défendre le chemin que nous avons tracé jusqu'aux xénoruines situées au nord-ouest de la plateforme d'atterrissage. C'est de là que nous sont venus les premiers blessés, poursuivis par ces maudites créatures. »
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha is leading a squad defending the path we've established to the xenoruins north-west of the landing pad. That's where the first wounded came in, and they were being chased by those cursed creatures."

traits.locale_text: « Le sergent-instructeur Jovakha, accompagné de son escouade, est parti défendre le chemin que nous avons tracé jusqu'aux xénoruines situées au nord-ouest de la plateforme d'atterrissage. C'est de là que nous sont venus les premiers blessés, poursuivis par ces maudites créatures. »

languages.text: “操练军士约瓦哈正率领一支小队，在着陆平台西北方向开辟的通道组织防御，那条路通往异形遗迹。第一批伤员就是从那里撤下来的，他们当时正被那该死的东西追击。”
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha is leading a squad defending the path we've established to the xenoruins north-west of the landing pad. That's where the first wounded came in, and they were being chased by those cursed creatures."

traits.locale_text: “操练军士约瓦哈正率领一支小队，在着陆平台西北方向开辟的通道组织防御，那条路通往异形遗迹。第一批伤员就是从那里撤下来的，他们当时正被那该死的东西追击。”

languages.text: "Talim Çavuşu Jovakha da iniş pistinin kuzeybatısındaki zeno harabelerine giden yolu savunan bir mangaya liderlik ediyor. İlk yaralılar oradan geldi, lanetli yaratıklar peşlerindeydi."
languages.original_text: "And Drill Sergeant Jovakha is leading a squad defending the path we've established to the xenoruins north-west of the landing pad. That's where the first wounded came in, and they were being chased by those cursed creatures."

traits.locale_text: "Talim Çavuşu Jovakha da iniş pistinin kuzeybatısındaki zeno harabelerine giden yolu savunan bir mangaya liderlik ediyor. İlk yaralılar oradan geldi, lanetli yaratıklar peşlerindeydi."
